name: Vegetarian Chili with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans.
2. Place all ingredients except cooked rice in a large saucepan. Add 1 cup water. Do not drain the tomatoes.
3. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. (Optional) Add a shot of Tabasco sauce at this point.
5. Top each serving of chili with 1/2 cup hot cooked rice.
